title: Jarx
compiled_truth: Jarx is an external contact at [PG&E](companies/pge). Over the corpus period (2000-11-13 to 2001-12-03), Jarx sent 4 and received 27 emails, totalling 31 interactions. Top correspondents: [Frank Ermis](people/frank-ermis) (2), [Matthew Lenhart](people/matthew-lenhart) (2).
